mapper.insert: insert into student_internship_status (student_id, status, company_id, position_id, has_complaint, is_delayed, is_interrupted, create_time, update_time) values (#{studentId}, #{status}, #{companyId}, #{positionId}, #{hasComplaint}, #{isDelayed}, #{isInterrupted}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select sis.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id, c.id as c_id, c.company_name as c_company_name, c.contact_person as c_contact_person, c.contact_phone as c_contact_phone, c.contact_email as c_contact_email, c.address as c_address, p.id as p_id, p.position_name as p_position_name, p.requirements as p_requirements, p.planned_recruit as p_planned_recruit, p.recruited_count as p_recruited_count, p.remaining_quota as p_remaining_quota from student_internship_status sis left join student_users su on sis.student_id = su.id left join company_users c on sis.company_id = c.id left join position p on sis.position_id = p.id where sis.id = #{id}

select sis.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id, c.id as c_id, c.company_name as c_company_name, c.contact_person as c_contact_person, c.contact_phone as c_contact_phone, c.contact_email as c_contact_email, c.address as c_address, p.id as p_id, p.position_name as p_position_name, p.requirements as p_requirements, p.planned_recruit as p_planned_recruit, p.recruited_count as p_recruited_count, p.remaining_quota as p_remaining_quota from student_internship_status sis left join student_users su on sis.student_id = su.id left join company_users c on sis.company_id = c.id left join position p on sis.position_id = p.id where sis.student_id = #{studentId} order by sis.create_time desc limit 1
mapper.update:
update student_internship_status
student_id = #{studentId},
status = #{status},
company_id = #{companyId},
position_id = #{positionId},
has_complaint = #{hasComplaint},
is_delayed = #{isDelayed},
is_interrupted = #{isInterrupted},
recall_status = #{recallStatus},
recall_reason = #{recallReason},
recall_apply_time = #{recallApplyTime},
recall_audit_time = #{recallAuditTime},
recall_reviewer_id = #{recallReviewerId},
recall_audit_remark = #{recallAuditRemark},
company_confirm_status = #{companyConfirmStatus},
internship_start_time = #{internshipStartTime},
internship_end_time = #{internshipEndTime},
internship_duration = #{internshipDuration},
feedback = #{feedback},
remark = #{remark},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select sis.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id, c.id as c_id, c.company_name as c_company_name, c.contact_person as c_contact_person, c.contact_phone as c_contact_phone, c.contact_email as c_contact_email, c.address as c_address, p.id as p_id, p.position_name as p_position_name, p.requirements as p_requirements, p.planned_recruit as p_planned_recruit, p.recruited_count as p_recruited_count, p.remaining_quota as p_remaining_quota from student_internship_status sis left join student_users su on sis.student_id = su.id left join company_users c on sis.company_id = c.id left join position p on sis.position_id = p.id order by sis.create_time desc

select sis.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id, c.id as c_id, c.company_name as c_company_name, c.contact_person as c_contact_person, c.contact_phone as c_contact_phone, c.contact_email as c_contact_email, c.address as c_address, p.id as p_id, p.position_name as p_position_name, p.requirements as p_requirements, p.planned_recruit as p_planned_recruit, p.recruited_count as p_recruited_count, p.remaining_quota as p_remaining_quota from student_internship_status sis left join student_users su on sis.student_id = su.id left join company_users c on sis.company_id = c.id left join position p on sis.position_id = p.id where sis.id in
#{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM student_internship_status WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: select sis.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id, c.id as c_id, c.company_name as c_company_name, c.contact_person as c_contact_person, c.contact_phone as c_contact_phone, c.contact_email as c_contact_email, c.address as c_address, p.id as p_id, p.position_name as p_position_name, p.requirements as p_requirements, p.planned_recruit as p_planned_recruit, p.recruited_count as p_recruited_count, p.remaining_quota as p_remaining_quota from student_internship_status sis left join student_users su on sis.student_id = su.id left join company_users c on sis.company_id = c.id left join position p on sis.position_id = p.id order by sis.create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_internship_status WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_internship_status WHERE company_id = #{companyId}
SELECT * FROM student_internship_status ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT m.name AS majorName, COUNT(DISTINCT su.id) AS totalStudents, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS confirmedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hasOfferCount, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 0 OR sis.status IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS notFoundCount, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedCount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status IN (2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT su.id), 1) AS progressRate FROM major m LEFT JOIN student_users su ON m.id = su.major_id LEFT JOIN student_internship_status sis ON su.id = sis.student_id GROUP BY m.id, m.name ORDER BY progressRate DESC

SELECT c.name AS className, m.name AS majorName, COUNT(DISTINCT su.id) AS totalStudents, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS confirmedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hasOfferCount, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 0 OR sis.status IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS notFoundCount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status IN (2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT su.id), 1) AS progressRate FROM class c LEFT JOIN major m ON c.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN student_users su ON c.id = su.class_id LEFT JOIN student_internship_status sis ON su.id = sis.student_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name, m.name ORDER BY m.name, c.name
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_internship_status WHERE recall_status = #{recallStatus}
mapper.update: UPDATE student_internship_status SET recall_status = 1, recall_reason = #{recallReason}, recall_apply_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND recall_status = 0

UPDATE student_internship_status
recall_status = #{recallStatus}, recall_audit_time = NOW(), recall_reviewer_id = #{reviewerId},
recall_audit_remark = #{recallAuditRemark},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND recall_status = 1
mapper.select: select sis.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id, c.id as c_id, c.company_name as c_company_name, c.contact_person as c_contact_person, c.contact_phone as c_contact_phone, c.contact_email as c_contact_email, c.address as c_address, p.id as p_id, p.position_name as p_position_name, p.requirements as p_requirements, p.planned_recruit as p_planned_recruit, p.recruited_count as p_recruited_count, p.remaining_quota as p_remaining_quota from student_internship_status sis left join student_users su on sis.student_id = su.id left join company_users c on sis.company_id = c.id left join position p on sis.position_id = p.id where sis.company_id = #{companyId} order by sis.create_time desc
